title: Moderation Update: High-Severity Report Resolution
body: Today's moderation queue has been processed: 1. Banned user 'spam_wave_42' for mass phishing link spam across 6 channels. 2. Banned user 'toxic_runner' for repeated targeted harassment of community newcomers. 3. Closed false positive report against core_maintainer resulting from coordinated brigading. All high-severity reports have been addressed. Reminder: Community guidelines are enforced to keep our space safe and welcoming for all members.
